trust_boundary.reliance_statement: This adapter describes evidence produced by existing ProofRail tools. The tools generate local evidence; they are not a trust authority.

control_surface.description: Evidence produced by the ProofRail multi-principal authority evaluator and multi-agent harness over local fixtures.

decision_event.description: ProofRail decision reports from the v0.2.3 authority evaluator. Each report carries execution.performed == false.

bypass_evidence.description: v0.2.4 harness transcript records bypass attempts with harness_outcome bypass_blocked and harness_reason bypass_attempt_detected.

revocation_status.description: Revocation marker events in the v0.2.4 harness transcript drive decision-time-based revocation checks against the v0.2.3 fixture.

subject_hashes.description: Bronze evidence bundle manifest, harness evidence manifest, and multi-agent demo package manifest all carry SHA-256 over their subjects.

source_identity.description: Source identity is the local ProofRail toolchain version recorded in each report's report_version / report_type fields. Declaration only; not a trust decision.

timestamp_integrity.description: Timestamps are wall-clock values recorded by the local toolchain. v0.2.6 does not verify clock trust.

normalization_notes: Maps ProofRail decision.status (allow/deny) to the normalized decision observation.
Maps decision.reason to the normalized reason field unchanged.
Does not assert that the underlying ProofRail run is itself trustworthy.

adapter_limitations: Static descriptor only; describes existing ProofRail tooling behavior.
Does not prove that the local ProofRail toolchain has not been tampered with.
Does not assert that local timestamps are authoritative.
non_claims: This adapter is not a certification.
This adapter does not make the local ProofRail toolchain a trust authority.
This adapter does not constitute Gold acceptance.
